name: Lobster Tabbouleh with Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Tomato; peeled, seeded, and diced medium
1 medium Cucumber; peeled, seeded, and diced medium
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the chicken stock, butter, and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat. Add couscous, cover, and let sit for 5 minutes. Transfer to a glass bowl and allow to cool.
2. In a small bowl, mix basil, garlic, olive oil, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt. Set aside.
3. In a large saucepot, bring 4 inches of water to a boil over high heat. Add lobsters and cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
4. Extract lobster meat from tails and claws, discarding intestines. Cut into 1/2-inch pieces.
5. In a medium bowl, combine lobster pieces with 6 tablespoons basil-oil mixture. Toss to coat.
6. In another medium bowl, mix cooled couscous, tomatoes, cucumbers, lemon juice, and remaining basil-oil mixture. Combine well.
7. Place a mound of tabbouleh in the center of each serving plate. Arrange lobster pieces around the edge.
